02044|   const calculatePnl = (currentValue: number, tokens: Array<{ symbol: string; valueUsd: number; address: string; chainId: number }>) => {
02045|     const storedCosts = secureStorage.getItem<Record<string, number>>(`token_costs_${address}`) || {}
02046|     
02047|     let totalCost = 0
02048|     const tokenPnls: Array<{ symbol: string; pnl: number; percentage: number }> = []
02049|     
02050|     for (const token of tokens) {
02051|       const key = `${token.chainId}_${token.address}`
02052|       const cost = storedCosts[key] || token.valueUsd
02053|       totalCost += cost
02054|       
02055|       const pnl = token.valueUsd - cost
02056|       const percentage = cost > 0 ? (pnl / cost) * 100 : 0
02057|       
02058|       tokenPnls.push({
02059|         symbol: token.symbol,
02060|         pnl,
02061|         percentage
02062|       })
02063|     }
02064|     
02065|     const totalPnl = currentValue - totalCost
02066|     const totalPercentage = totalCost > 0 ? (totalPnl / totalCost) * 100 : 0
02067|     
02068|     return {
02069|       total: totalPnl,
02070|       percentage: totalPercentage,
02071|       tokens: tokenPnls.sort((a, b) => Math.abs(b.pnl) - Math.abs(a.pnl)).slice(0, 5)
02072|     }
02073|   }

02170|   const batchRevokeApprovals = async () => {
02171|     if (!address || !revokeChain || selectedApprovals.size === 0) return
02172|     
02173|     setIsRevoking(true)
02174|     try {
02175|       // Check if we need to switch chains
02176|       if (connectedChainId !== revokeChain.id) {
02177|         console.log('Switching chain to', revokeChain.displayName)
02178|         try {
02179|           await switchChain({ chainId: revokeChain.id })
02180|           toast.success('Chain switched')
02181|           await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500))
02182|         } catch (switchError) {
02183|           console.error('Failed to switch chain:', switchError)
02184|           toast.error('Please switch to the correct network')

02187|         }
02188|       }
02189|       
02190|       const selectedApprovalsArray = Array.from(selectedApprovals).map(idx => approvals[idx])
02191|       let successCount = 0
02192|       let failCount = 0
02193|       
02194|       for (const approval of selectedApprovalsArray) {
02195|         try {

02197|             sendTransaction({

02200|             }, {
02201|               onSuccess: (hash) => {
02202|                 successCount++
02203|                 
02204|                 // Save revoke transaction to local storage
02205|                 const revokeHistory: SwapHistory = {
02206|                   id: hash,
02207|                   type: 'revoke',
02208|                   fromToken: approval.token.address,
02209|                   fromTokenSymbol: approval.token.symbol,
02210|                   fromTokenDecimals: approval.token.decimals,
02211|                   fromTokenLogo: approval.token.metadata?.logoURI,

02213|                   toTokenSymbol: approval.spenderName || 'Unknown',
02214|                   toTokenDecimals: 0,
02215|                   fromAmount: '0',

02217|                   fromChain: revokeChain.displayName,

02220|                   toChain: revokeChain.displayName,

02225|                   completedAt: Date.now(),
02226|                   txHash: hash,
02227|                 }
02228|                 
02229|                 // Get existing revoke history from local storage
02230|                 const existingHistory = localStorage.getItem('revokeHistory')
02231|                 const revokeHistoryArray = existingHistory ? JSON.parse(existingHistory) : []
02232|                 revokeHistoryArray.unshift(revokeHistory)
02233|                 
02234|                 // Keep only last 50 revoke transactions
02235|                 if (revokeHistoryArray.length > 50) {
02236|                   revokeHistoryArray.splice(50)
02237|                 }
02238|                 
02239|                 localStorage.setItem('revokeHistory', JSON.stringify(revokeHistoryArray))
02240|                 console.log('Saved revoke transaction to localStorage:', hash)
02241|                 
02242|                 resolve(hash)
02243|               },
02244|               onError: (error) => {

02246|                 failCount++
02247|                 reject(error)
02248|               }
02249|             })
02250|           })
02251|           await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000))
02252|         } catch (error) {

02254|         }
02255|       }

02356|     if (!fromBalance) return
02357|     const balance = parseFloat(formatUnits(fromBalance.value, fromBalance.decimals))
02358|     const amount = (balance * percentage / 100).toString()
02359|     setFromAmount(amount)
02360|

02372|   const switchToChain = async (chain: RelayChain) => {
02373|     if (chain.id === connectedChainId) return
02374|     const chainIdHex = `0x${chain.id.toString(16)}`
02375|     const provider = (window as { ethereum?: { request: (args: { method: string; params?: unknown[] }) => Promise<unknown> } }).ethereum
02376|     if (!provider) {
02377|       toast.error('No wallet detected')
02378|       return
02379|     }
02380|     try {
02381|       await provider.request({
02382|         method: 'wallet_switchEthereumChain',
02383|         params: [{ chainId: chainIdHex }],
02384|       })
02385|     } catch (switchError: unknown) {
02386|       const code = (switchError as { code?: number }).code
02387|       if (code === 4902 || code === -32603) {
02388|         try {
02389|           await provider.request({
02390|             method: 'wallet_addEthereumChain',
02391|             params: [{
02392|               chainId: chainIdHex,
02393|               chainName: chain.displayName,
02394|               nativeCurrency: {

02401|             }],
02402|           })
02403|         } catch (addError) {
02404|           console.error('Failed to add chain:', addError)
02405|           toast.error(`Failed to add ${chain.displayName} to wallet`)
02406|         }
02407|       } else {

02410|       }
02411|     }

02452|       return 0
